positive: A minimalist, elegant silhouette of a playful woodland animal scene: a leaping fox, a curled-up deer, and a trio of whimsical wildflowers, all positioned in a central, balanced composition. The style should be modern vector illustration mixed with delicate linocut etching, utilizing bold, clean outlines and negative space. Use a limited, earthy color palette of forest green, burnt sienna, and deep indigo ink on a bright, crisp white background. The linework must be highly crisp, high contrast, and perfectly isolated, suitable for high-quality screen printing on fabric. Full body shots, dynamic yet contained poses, centered composition.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, blurry, noise, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, copyright, celebrity, photorealistic, gradient, gradient background, clutter
